name: charter
description: Know the project: gates substantive work on documented quality attributes (web projects get Lighthouse-aligned defaults — CWV, a11y, print CSS, progressive enhancement, components-by-default — so best practices are designed-in, not audited after), maintains a committed Claude-facing roadmap/backlog file (cross-session/engineer coordination), and keeps a project map (file→responsibility index) so a session orients from the map instead of re-scanning the tree. Generates the docs from the codebase/git history when missing, reconciles them when present. Read-only over the project (the hook detects; the model authors the files).
